raw_action_dict.reasoning: Long straight ahead but car is drifting left of center with heading 11.99° while track bearing is -16.24°, giving delta of -28.23° requiring a moderate right correction.
knowledge: After waypoint 114, track runs nearly due east at y≈0.68 — long straight ahead
Car tends to drift left of center on the straight — moderate right corrections needed
Positive delta = steer left (positive steering_angle), negative = steer right
At delta < 5°, use steering_angle=0 at speed 1.5 to avoid oscillation

Oversteer warning: once delta drops below 5°, use steering_angle=0 immediately
Track curves right (south) around waypoint 24-30 based on waypoint data

Previous -5° steering was insufficient to correct the leftward drift
